REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (3321 21st Street, San Francisco, Ca 94110)
Off Calendar Dec-04-2013 Granted Per Written Order

FILING OF FIRST ACCOUNT
Off Calendar Dec-02-2013 Continued To Jan-06-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Andrew Schultz for Barbara de Vries (Trustee).

Status on filing of the first account was continued to January 6, 2014 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Judge Sing disclosed the relationship with Daniel McGue (bidder) as her Former Tenant and stated that she does not feel that this fact will affect her ability to be fair and impartial to all Parties and all Counsel. The sale was confirmed at $3,550,000.00 to Melanie Morris on behalf of Jhansi Reddy based on the terms and conditions as set forth in the report of sale. The Court granted the Petition to Confirm Sale of Real Property (subject to review of the order). An additional bond in the amount of $3,372,000.00 is required.

Judge: Lillian K. Sing. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy T. Bradley. (Not Reported)
